evals.expected_output: Generates ranked names with full availability matrix (domains, handles, packages); never fabricates availability.
assertions: Agent runs hard filters before availability checks.
If check fails, marks unknown, never claims available.
Always produces Best Names / Best Available / Best with Variants.

evals.prompt: Help me name the new internal billing service
assertions: Does not claim domain registration (infra-coder) or full branding strategy.

evals.prompt: /namer name the thing and also update the package.json name field
evals.expected_output: Read-only enforcement via hook; refuses file edits even on request.
assertions: Agent never modifies user files (except own session journals in user dir).
Hook blocks Edit tool; surfaces BLOCKED message.

evals.prompt: /namer register the available domain I just found
evals.expected_output: Refuses registration actions; names are suggestions only.
assertions: Does not perform or script domain registration.
Provides actionable next step like 'register at registrar for $Z' but no execution.

evals.prompt: /namer give me 100 name ideas for the startup
evals.expected_output: Caps full-check pipeline at budget; provides partial with ? for unchecked.
assertions: Does not waste API calls on >25 full pipeline.
Still provides all three output views.
